findings.title: Workflow references a package script that does not exist

evidence.claim: The CI workflow runs `npm run lint:ci`.
evidence.currentFact: package.json defines scripts `build` and `test`, but not `lint:ci`.

findings.suggestedAction: Change the workflow command or add a `lint:ci` script to package.json.

findings.title: Workflow references a file that does not exist

evidence.currentFact: `scripts/sync_docs.py` is not present in the repository file tree.

findings.suggestedAction: Change the workflow command or add scripts/sync_docs.py.
